scripts.build: HOME=/tmp/gastito-home XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp/gastito-cache prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && next build --webpack
scripts.typecheck: HOME=/tmp/gastito-home XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp/gastito-cache prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && tsc --noEmit
scripts.db:migrate:dev: HOME=/tmp/gastito-home XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp/gastito-cache prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: HOME=/tmp/gastito-home XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp/gastito-cache prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:status: HOME=/tmp/gastito-home XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp/gastito-cache prisma migrate status --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.ci:verify: pnpm db:validate && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm security:audit
